message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor DarkSlateGray
  LifeLineBorderColor DarkSlateGray
  LifeLineShadowColor none
  ActorBorderColor DarkSlateGray
  ActorBackgroundColor White
}

actor "CenterCoordinator" as CenterCoordinator
participant "DataFromLegacySystemUI" as DataFromLegacySystemUI
participant "DataFromLegacySystemController" as DataFromLegacySystemController
participant "ReadLegacyDataFile" as ReadLegacyDataFile
participant "Company" as Company
participant "SNSUserStore" as SNSUserStore
participant "App" as App
participant "VaccinationCenter" as VaccinationCenter
participant "vaccinationCentersStore" as vaccinationCentersStore

CenterCoordinator -> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 1 Asks to load a CSV file with legacy data
activate DataFromLegacySystemUI
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 2 DataFromLegacySystemController()
activate DataFromLegacySystemController
DataFromLegacySystemController -> Company: 3 getVaccinationCentersStore()
activate Company
Company --> DataFromLegacySystemController: 4 returns the store
deactivate Company
DataFromLegacySystemController -> vaccinationCentersStore: 5 getVaccinationCenterAssociatedToCoordinator(id)
activate vaccinationCentersStore
vaccinationCentersStore --> DataFromLegacySystemController: 6 returns the vaccination center
deactivate vaccinationCentersStore
DataFromLegacySystemController -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 7 ReadLegacyDataFile(center)
activate ReadLegacyDataFile
DataFromLegacySystemUI --> CenterCoordinator: 8 request path of the CSV file
CenterCoordinator --> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 9 types path
DataFromLegacySystemUI -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 10 readFile(path)
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 11 readFile(String path)
activate ReadLegacyDataFile
rect rgb(255, 192, 203)
note right: loop
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: while csv has new lines:
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 12 validateFile(legacySNSUserNumber,\nfirstDate,secondDate,thirdDate,fourthDate)
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 13 Saves data into an ArrayList<String> called\nlegacyDataList
end note
end rect
ReadLegacyDataFile -> SNSUserStore: 14 getSNSUserList()
activate SNSUserStore
SNSUserStore -> SNSUserStore: 15 getSNSUserList()
SNSUserStore --> SNSUserStore: 16 returns list
deactivate SNSUserStore
SNSUserStore --> ReadLegacyDataFile: 17 returns list
ReadLegacyDataFile -> Company: 18 getVaccineList()
activate Company
Company --> ReadLegacyDataFile: 19 returns list
deactivate Company
rect rgb(255, 192, 203)
note right: loop
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: while legacyDataList has new lines:
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 20 findPosOf(SNSUserInUsersList,\nvalues.positionInSNSUserList)
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 21 findPosOf(VaxxInVaccineList,values.positionInVaccinesList)
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 22 checkDuplicates(updatedList,snsUsersList,vaccineList,positionInSnsUserList,positionInVaccinesList,lineOfTheData)
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 23 Saves data into an ArrayList<String> called updatedList
end note
end rect
ReadLegacyDataFile -> VaccinationCenter: 24 createArrival()
activate VaccinationCenter
VaccinationCenter -> Arrival: 25 createArrival()
activate Arrival
Arrival --> VaccinationCenter: 26 returns Arrival
deactivate Arrival
VaccinationCenter -> VaccinationCenter: 27 Saves arrival into List<Arrival> called arrivalsList
VaccinationCenter -> VaccinationCenter: 28 genericsArrivals.binaryFileWrite(Constants.FILE_PATH_ARRIVALS, arrivalsList)
VaccinationCenter -> VaccinationCenter: 29 createDeparture()
VaccinationCenter -> Departure: 30 createDeparture()
activate Departure
Departure --> VaccinationCenter: 31 returns departure
deactivate Departure
VaccinationCenter -> VaccinationCenter: 32 Saves departure into List<Departure> called departuresList
VaccinationCenter -> VaccinationCenter: 33 genericsDeparture.binaryFileWrite(Constants.FILE_PATH_DEPARTURES, departuresList)
deactivate VaccinationCenter
VaccinationCenter --> ReadLegacyDataFile: 34 returns updatedList
deactivate ReadLegacyDataFile
ReadLegacyDataFile --> DataFromLegacySystemController: 35 returns updatedList
deactivate DataFromLegacySystemController
DataFromLegacySystemController --> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 36 requests the option to sort
DataFromLegacySystemUI --> CenterCoordinator: 37 selects option
CenterCoordinator -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 38 chooseCriteriaToSort(option)
DataFromLegacySystemController -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 39 setList(option)
activate ReadLegacyDataFile
rect rgb(255, 192, 203)
note right: loop
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: while updatedList has new lines:
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 40 Saves dates to a \n40 a List<LocalDateTime>\ncalled listToSort
end note
end rect
deactivate ReadLegacyDataFile
DataFromLegacySystemController --> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 41 requests the order of the sort
DataFromLegacySystemUI --> CenterCoordinator: alt algorithmTobeUsed = "InsertionSort", option = "0 - Ascending"
CenterCoordinator -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 42 selects order
DataFromLegacySystemController -> App: 43 getAlgorithm()
activate App
App -> App: 44 getSortingAlgorithm()
App --> App: 45 returns algorithm
deactivate App
App --> DataFromLegacySystemController: 46 returns algorithm
DataFromLegacySystemController -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 47 sortListWithAlgorithm(algorithmTobeUsed,option)
activate ReadLegacyDataFile
note right: algorithmTobeUsed can be InsertionSort or HeapSort, both have methods that\ncan sort in ascending/descending order, here we are just representing\nthe InsertionSort algorithm because HeapSort functions in a similar way.
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 48 insertionSortAscending()
ReadLegacyDataFile --> ReadLegacyDataFile: 49 returns sortedList
deactivate ReadLegacyDataFile
ReadLegacyDataFile --> DataFromLegacySystemController: 50 returns sortedList
DataFromLegacySystemController --> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 51 prints sortedList
deactivate DataFromLegacySystemUI
DataFromLegacySystemUI --> CenterCoordinator: alt algorithmTobeUsed = "InsertionSort", option = "1 - Descending"
CenterCoordinator -> DataFromLegacySystemController: 52 selects order
DataFromLegacySystemController -> App: 53 getAlgorithm()
activate App
App -> App: 54 getSortingAlgorithm()
App --> App: 55 returns algorithm
deactivate App
App --> DataFromLegacySystemController: 56 returns algorithm
DataFromLegacySystemController -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 57 sortListWithAlgorithm(algorithmTobeUsed,option)
activate ReadLegacyDataFile
ReadLegacyDataFile -> ReadLegacyDataFile: 58 insertionSortDescending()
ReadLegacyDataFile --> ReadLegacyDataFile: 59 returns sortedList
deactivate ReadLegacyDataFile
ReadLegacyDataFile --> DataFromLegacySystemController: 60 returns sortedList
DataFromLegacySystemController --> DataFromLegacySystemUI: 61 prints sortedList
deactivate DataFromLegacySystemUI

@enduml
```
